name: akd-agents
description: AKD Agents for Science — Claude Code plugins for exploring NASA science data, from Earth observation to planetary archives.

plugins.name: worldview-assistant
plugins.description: Explore NASA Worldview in natural language: discover satellite datasets, understand what they represent, and generate reproducible map visualizations.

plugins.name: pds-assistant
plugins.description: Find the right NASA Planetary Data System (PDS) datasets for a planetary-science query: route to the correct PDS node, walk the live archives, and return grounded dataset identifiers and paths.

plugins.name: code-search-assistant
plugins.description: Discover and comparatively rank public scientific code repositories for a research or technical task across NASA SMD domains — read-only, with reliability signals; returns up to 6 grounded candidates or abstains.

plugins.name: scope-interview
plugins.description: Strict, structured requirements-interview agent that extracts a complete Scope Requirements Document before any design or implementation. Optionally explores the project codebase and writes the doc to docs/scope/.

plugins.name: cmr-assistant
plugins.description: Discover and relevance-rank NASA Earthdata (CMR) collections for an Earth science question: normalize to GCMD keywords, search collections, verify granule availability, and return Concept IDs with reproducible provenance. Read-only and human-in-the-loop — never recommends, endorses, or downloads.
